nodes.name: Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park
nodes.summary: Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Cream-breasted fruit dove、Rufous hornbill、Rufous paradise flycatcher等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cordillera ground warbler
nodes.summary: Cordillera ground warbler（Cordillera ground warbler，学名 Robsonius rabori），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 呂宋
nodes.summary: 呂宋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联13种鸟类，包括Rufous coucal、Flame-breasted fruit dove、菲律賓三趾翠鳥等13种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 中央山脈 (呂宋島)
nodes.summary: 中央山脈 (呂宋島)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cordillera ground warbler，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括绿翅雁、Stubble quail、菲律賓鴉鵑等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in northwest Luzon in the foothills of the Cordillera Mountain Range.s natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests

links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in northwest Luzon in the foothills of the Cordillera Mountain Range.s natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in northwest Luzon in the foothills of the Cordillera Mountain Range.s natural habitat is tropical moist lowland forests

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in lowland moist dipterocarp forest, in primary forest, secondary forest and forest edge up to 500 m

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in lowland moist dipterocarp forest, in primary forest, secondary forest and forest edge up to 500 m

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is typically found on the forest floor among limestone outcrops, bamboo and mossy rocks. IUCN previously assessed this bird as vulnerable with the population being estimated at 2,500 to 9,999 mature individuals but this was updated to Near-threatened.This downlisting does not mean that this species is increasing but rather reflects data that this species may occurs in higher densities than originally believed

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This species is found in only one protected area the Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It has only been photographed once in the wild. It is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss due to wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
